test-method.name: testCartPageHeadingVisible
test-method.description: TC_CIV_001: Cart page loads with 'Shopping Cart' heading

test-method.name: testCartItemNamesVisible
test-method.description: TC_CIV_002: Each cart item has a visible non-empty name

test-method.name: testCartItemUnitPricesVisible
test-method.description: TC_CIV_003: Each cart item has a visible unit price > 0

test-method.name: testCartItemRowTotalsVisible
test-method.description: TC_CIV_004: Each cart item has a visible row total > 0

test-method.name: testCartItemImageVisible
test-method.description: TC_CIV_005: Cart item product image is visible

test-method.name: testCartItemIsClickableLink
test-method.description: TC_CIV_006: Cart item name is a clickable product link

test-method.name: testOrderSummaryVisible
test-method.description: TC_CIV_007: Order summary section visible with subtotal, tax, total

test-method.name: testHeadingBadgeMatchesRows
test-method.description: TC_CIV_008: Heading badge count matches actual visible row count

test-method.name: testLocalStorageCountMatchesRows
test-method.description: TC_CIV_009: localStorage item count matches visible cart rows

test-method.name: testRemoveItemUpdatesBadge
test-method.description: TC_CIV_010: Removing an item updates heading badge count

test-method.name: testDefaultQuantityIsOne
test-method.description: TC_QTY_001: Default quantity is 1 when product first added

test-method.name: testPlusButtonIncrementsQty
test-method.description: TC_QTY_002: Plus button increments quantity by 1 each click

test-method.name: testMinusButtonDecrementsQty
test-method.description: TC_QTY_003: Minus button decrements quantity by 1 each click

test-method.name: testQtyCannotGoBelowOne
test-method.description: TC_QTY_004: Quantity cannot go below 1 (minus disabled at minimum)

test-method.name: testQtyPersistsAfterRefresh
test-method.description: TC_QTY_005: Quantity persists after page refresh

test-method.name: testAddSameProductIncreasesQtyNotRows
test-method.description: TC_QTY_006: Adding same product again increases qty, not row count

test-method.name: testIndependentQuantitiesPerItem
test-method.description: TC_QTY_007: Two different items maintain independent quantities

test-method.name: testUnitPriceMatchesDetailPage
test-method.description: TC_PRC_001: Unit price in cart matches selling price on detail page

exception.message: Cart unit price (5525.0) must match detail page price (55.25) expected [55.25] but found [5525.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Cart unit price (5525.0) must match detail page price (55.25) expected [55.25] but found [5525.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:698) at com.ekart.tests.CartValidationTest.testUnitPriceMatchesDetailPage(CartValidationTest.java:556) at java.base/jdk.internal.reflect.DirectMethodHandleAccessor.invoke(DirectMethodHandleAccessor.java:103) at java.base/java.lang.reflect.Method.invoke(Method.java:580) at org.testng.internal.invokers.MethodInvocationHelper.invokeMethod(MethodInvocationHelper.java:139) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestInvoker.invokeMethod(TestInvoker.java:664) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.invokeTestMethods(TestMethodWorker.java:148) at org.testng.internal.invokers.TestMethodWorker.run(TestMethodWorker.java:128) at java.base/java.util.ArrayList.forEach(ArrayList.java:1596) at org.testng.TestRunner.privateRun(TestRunner.java:819) at org.testng.TestRunner.run(TestRunner.java:619) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runTest(SuiteRunner.java:443) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.runSequentially(SuiteRunner.java:437) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.privateRun(SuiteRunner.java:397) at org.testng.SuiteRunner.run(SuiteRunner.java:336) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.runSuite(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:52) at org.testng.SuiteRunnerWorker.run(SuiteRunnerWorker.java:95) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesSequentially(TestNG.java:1301) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuitesLocally(TestNG.java:1228) at org.testng.TestNG.runSuites(TestNG.java:1134) at org.testng.TestNG.run(TestNG.java:1101) at org.testng.remote.AbstractRemoteTestNG.run(AbstractRemoteTestNG.java:115) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.initAndRun(RemoteTestNG.java:293) at org.testng.remote.RemoteTestNG.main(RemoteTestNG.java:91)

test-method.name: testRowTotalEqualsUnitPriceAtQtyOne
test-method.description: TC_PRC_002: Row total = unit price × quantity when qty=1

test-method.name: testRowTotalUpdatesAfterIncrease
test-method.description: TC_PRC_003: Row total updates correctly after quantity increase

exception.message: Row total after increase: expected=11050.0 got=1105.0 (unitPrice=5525.0 qty=2) expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Row total after increase: expected=11050.0 got=1105.0 (unitPrice=5525.0 qty=2) expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:698) at test-method.name: testRowTotalUpdatesAfterDecrease
test-method.description: TC_PRC_004: Row total updates correctly after quantity decrease

exception.message: Row total after decrease: expected=11050.0 got=1105.0 (unitPrice=5525.0 qty=2) expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Row total after decrease: expected=11050.0 got=1105.0 (unitPrice=5525.0 qty=2) expected [11050.0] but found [1105.0] at test-method.name: testSubtotalEqualsSumOfRowTotals
test-method.description: TC_PRC_005: Order summary subtotal equals sum of all row totals

exception.message: Subtotal (131049.0) must equal sum of row totals (121104.0) expected [121104.0] but found [131049.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Subtotal (131049.0) must equal sum of row totals (121104.0) expected [121104.0] but found [131049.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at test-method.name: testTaxIsPositive
test-method.description: TC_PRC_006: Tax is > 0 when subtotal is non-zero

exception.message: Tax % must be between 1–30. Got=0.18099547511312217% (tax=10.0 subtotal=5525.0) expected [true] but found [false]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Tax % must be between 1–30. Got=0.18099547511312217% (tax=10.0 subtotal=5525.0) expected [true] but found [false] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:57) at com.ekart.tests.CartValidationTest.testTaxIsPositive(CartValidationTest.java:675) at test-method.name: testTotalEqualsSubtotalPlusShippingPlusTax
test-method.description: TC_PRC_007: Total = subtotal + shipping + tax

exception.message: Total (10525.0) must equal subtotal+shipping+tax (5525.0+40.0+10.0=5575.0) expected [5575.0] but found [10525.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Total (10525.0) must equal subtotal+shipping+tax (5525.0+40.0+10.0=5575.0) expected [5575.0] but found [10525.0] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:111) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:1578) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:698) at test-method.name: testPricesHaveCurrencySymbol
test-method.description: TC_PRC_008: All prices display with ₹ currency symbol

test-method.name: testAllPricesAreValidNumbers
test-method.description: TC_PRC_009: All price values are valid numbers (no NaN / 0 / null)

test-method.name: testPricesRecalculateAfterRemove
test-method.description: TC_PRC_010: All prices recalculate correctly after removing one item

exception.message: Total must equal subtotal+shipping+tax after remove. 1105.0+40.0+20.0=1165.0 UI=1705.0 expected [1165.0] but found [1705.0]
exception.full-stacktrace: java.lang.AssertionError: Total must equal subtotal+shipping+tax after remove. 1105.0+40.0+20.0=1165.0 UI=1705.0 expected [1165.0] but found [1705.0] at
